title: Usage tracking endpoint + Redis counters
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/signals/usage: returns current billing period requests, limit, remaining, reset_at, tier
Usage stored in Redis with key pattern signals:usage:{key_id}:{period}
Redis counter incremented on every authenticated request (non-webhook)
Counter persisted to signals_api_usage table on period end
Usage synced to Postgres for billing accuracy
Rate limit headers on all responses: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
